entity.summary: United Kingdom-origin crypto wallet and exchange/trading platform founded in York, with its global headquarters in London.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0364 and hei_unadded_0366 as one entity. Official company material states that Blockchain.com began in York and now has its global headquarters in London. Blockchain.io / hei_unadded_0365 is not consumed here.

events.title: Blockchain.com recorded as exchange entity
events.description: Blockchain.com is recorded as a United Kingdom-origin exchange/trading-platform entity, with Blockchain.com and blockchaincom candidate rows consolidated into one HEI record.
events.notes: Official company history supports the York origin and London headquarters. Add a precise exchange-product launch milestone if stronger dated evidence is identified.

evidence.title: Blockchain.com secures UK FCA registration
evidence.notes: Official company post says Blockchain.com started in a small office in York and identifies London as its global headquarters, supporting the United Kingdom origin classification.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Blockchain.com
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0364.

evidence.title: CCXT reference for blockchaincom
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0366.
